mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'CHARGED' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) as charge_amount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'REFUNDED' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) as refund_amount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'CHARGED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as charge_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'REFUNDED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as refund_count FROM charge_item WHERE status IN ('CHARGED', 'REFUNDED') AND DATE(COALESCE(charge_time, refund_time, create_time)) = #{summaryDate}::date
